topic: Troubleshooting Transaction Mapping and Application Data Display
summary: This topic addresses common issues where transactions, such as registration fees, are not appearing in the application data after being mapped, preventing progression to the next admission stage.
steps: Ensure transaction mapping is correctly configured.
Verify that the application data is set up to display the mapped transactions.
Check if the system allows collection of the specified amount (e.g., 1000 rupees for registration).
Confirm that the next stage progression is correctly linked to the transaction completion.
business_rules: Correct transaction mapping should enable the display of transactions in application data.
Successful transaction collection should allow progression to the next admission stage.
important_notes: This is a troubleshooting scenario for initial admission phase setup.
questions: Why are my mapped transactions not appearing in the application data?
How do I resolve issues with transactions not showing after mapping?
Why can't I proceed to the next admission stage after entering registration fees?
What steps should I take if I cannot collect registration fees in the application data?
